rationale: I detected unexpected concurrent edits to `state/best_script.py` while working: it changed from 1497 lines / 74256 bytes to 1545 lines / 76033 bytes and introduced new sections (for example `tensor_roundtrip_mse` / `apply_projection_ema_selective`) that I did not add. Per safety rules, I stopped. Please confirm which base I should use next: (1) the earlier 1497-line snapshot, or (2) the current mutated 1545-line file (which violates your <1500-line hard rule).
title: Blocker: Concurrent Script Mutation
